basic_details.job_title: PAU Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Young Professional-1 Notification 2026 has been released on the official website Punjab Agricultural University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Young Professional-1 Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 45 years who have completed B. Tech. (Agricultural Engineering) with minimum OGPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks along with knowledge of Punjabi upto Matric Level are eligible to apply for these Young Professional-1 vacancies. The offline application process for PAU Young Professional-1 Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech. (Agricultural Engineering) with minimum OGPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks, Knowledge of Punjabi upto Matric Level
qualification.details: B. Tech. (Agricultural Engineering) with minimum OGPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. Knowledge of Punjabi upto Matric Level.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Young Professional-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PAU Young Professional-1 recruitment is 21st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech. in Agricultural Engineering with a minimum OGPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks. Additionally, knowledge of Punjabi up to the Matriculation level is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Young Professional-1 post is between 21 years and 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-1 post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 30,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PAU Young Professional-1 job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Young Professional-1 post in this recruitment drive by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the PAU Young Professional-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 200/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. Please refer to the official notification for payment details.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Young Professional-1 is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University (PAU), the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.
